category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Mongolia market (MASM national conformity certification, MNS/GOST-based standards).

title.en: China-to-Mongolia PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器出口蒙古（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器出口蒙古（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Mongolia requirements under MASM national conformity certification, MNS standards (GOST/IEC-adopted), and national-language labelling rules. Mongolia is not an EAEU member — TR CU 019/2011 does not apply. No horizontal RoHS regime. National PPE rules via the Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology (MASM) govern the market.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与蒙古要求对照，涵盖MASM国家合格认证、MNS标准（采用GOST/IEC）及国家语言标签规则。蒙古不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员——TR CU 019/2011不适用，无横向RoHS制度。市场受蒙古国家标准与计量局（MASM）国家PPE规则管辖。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與蒙古要求對照，涵蓋MASM國家合格認證、MNS標準（採用GOST/IEC）及國家語言標籤規則。蒙古不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員——TR CU 019/2011不適用，無橫向RoHS制度。市場受蒙古國家標準與計量局（MASM）國家PPE規則管轄。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Mongolian law, applicable MNS standards, MASM certification requirements, and destination-country market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. Mongolia is not an EAEU member; TR CU technical regulations do not apply.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行蒙古法律、适用MNS标准、MASM认证要求及目的地国市场监督实践。蒙古不是EAEU成员；TR CU技术法规不适用。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行蒙古法律、適用MNS標準、MASM認證要求及目的地國市場監督實踐。蒙古不是EAEU成員；TR CU技術法規不適用。

answer_first.en: Respiratory PPE (KN95/respirators) exported from China to Mongolia requires national conformity certification via MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) based on MNS standards that adopt GOST 12.4.x or EN 149 equivalents. Mongolia is NOT an EAEU member — TR CU 019/2011 (the EAEU PPE technical regulation) does not apply. There is no horizontal RoHS regime. Goods transit via China (Tianjin port) or Russia. Mongolian-language labelling is required. Chinese GB 2626 (KN95) test reports may partially support MASM certification if the applicable MNS standard closely mirrors GOST, but exporters must confirm the current MNS standard and MASM certification scope before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 从中国出口至蒙古的呼吸防护PPE（KN95/呼吸器）须通过蒙古国家标准与计量局（MASM）进行国家合格认证，依据采用GOST 12.4.x或EN 149等效的MNS标准。蒙古不是EAEU成员——TR CU 019/2011（EAEU PPE技术法规）不适用，无横向RoHS制度。货物经中国（天津港）或俄罗斯过境。需使用蒙古语标签。若适用MNS标准与GOST密切对应，中国GB 2626（KN95）检测报告可部分支持MASM认证，但出口商须在出货前确认当前MNS标准及MASM认证范围。
answer_first.zht: 從中國出口至蒙古的呼吸防護PPE（KN95/呼吸器）須通過蒙古國家標準與計量局（MASM）進行國家合格認證，依據採用GOST 12.4.x或EN 149等效的MNS標準。蒙古不是EAEU成員——TR CU 019/2011（EAEU PPE技術法規）不適用，無橫向RoHS制度。貨物經中國（天津港）或俄羅斯過境。需使用蒙古語標籤。若適用MNS標準與GOST密切對應，中國GB 2626（KN95）檢測報告可部分支持MASM認證，但出口商須在出貨前確認當前MNS標準及MASM認證範圍。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Annual or upon major regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
